_description: Default configuration for distributed pipeline runs. CLI arguments override these values.

defaults._max_tickers_comment: null = all available tickers. Set to integer to limit.
defaults._days_comment: Number of days of historical data to fetch
defaults._dry_run_comment: If true, simulate API calls without making real requests
defaults._skip_bronze_comment: If true, skip bronze layer ingestion
defaults._skip_silver_comment: If true, skip silver layer model building
defaults._log_level_comment: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

alpha_vantage._endpoints_comment: Endpoints to ingest. Available: time_series_daily, time_series_daily_adjusted, company_overview, global_quote, income_statement, balance_sheet, cash_flow, earnings

bls._series_comment: BLS series to ingest. See bls_endpoints.json for available series codes.

chicago._datasets_comment: Chicago Data Portal datasets to ingest

silver_models._models_comment: Models to build after bronze ingestion. Order matters (dependencies).
silver_models._skip_on_dry_run_comment: If true, skip silver build during dry runs

cluster._ray_address_comment: Ray cluster address. 'auto' = discover from environment
cluster._fallback_to_local_comment: If cluster connection fails, run locally
cluster._task_batch_size_comment: Number of tasks to submit in each batch for better progress tracking

ticker_source._priority_comment: Order of sources to try for ticker discovery
ticker_source._filter_us_exchanges_comment: Only include tickers from US exchanges (NYSE, NASDAQ, etc.)
ticker_source._test_tickers_comment: Sample tickers for dry-run testing when no bronze data exists. Only used in dry_run mode.

retry._comment: Retry configuration for failed API calls

profiles._comment: Named profiles for common run scenarios. Use --profile to activate.
